title: Mounted Local Catalogue Editor Route Shells
summary: Mounted the Catalogue Series, Work, Work Detail, and Moment editor route shells in the local Studio app server and retired their old Jekyll route shells.
effect: The local Studio app now serves `/studio/catalogue-series/?mode=manage`, `/studio/catalogue-work/?mode=manage`, `/studio/catalogue-work-detail/?mode=manage`, and `/studio/catalogue-moment/?mode=manage` with the existing vanilla catalogue editor browser modules. The old Jekyll shells have been removed. Catalogue route shells live in `scripts/studio/studio_catalogue_views.py` so the shared view module does not absorb the full route family. Catalogue create/save/build/publication/delete/import APIs still use the existing `127.0.0.1:8788` sibling catalogue service until a later route-family API consolidation slice.
verification: Python and JavaScript syntax checks passed for the touched Studio app, config, and catalogue editor files
